updates.title: Claude adds Foundation Models framework support for Apple platforms (iOS 27, macOS 27, and more)
updates.summary: Anthropic released a Swift package enabling Apple developers to integrate Claude through Apple's Foundation Models framework, announced at WWDC 2026. The package lets developers prototype with Apple's on-device model and route complex queries — multi-step reasoning, code generation, web search, code execution — to Claude by updating a Swift Package Manager dependency, with no changes to session logic. Support spans iOS 27, iPadOS 27, macOS 27, visionOS 27, and watchOS 27, making Claude a first-class cloud model option in Apple's LanguageModel protocol ecosystem alongside Google Gemini.
updates.accuracy_notes: Highly verified — corroborated by Apple's WWDC 2026 event (June 8), Anthropic official newsroom (anthropic.com/news/claude-in-xcode), iPhone in Canada (June 8), TechTimes (June 9), and Releasebot aggregator. The LanguageModel protocol and Foundation Models framework details are consistent across all sources.

updates.title: Claude Enterprise adds admin permissions to custom roles
updates.summary: Anthropic extended its Enterprise plan custom roles framework with a new tier of admin permissions, allowing designated workspace members to access specific administrative areas — such as billing or privacy settings — without requiring full Owner-level access. This update gives IT and operations teams in large organizations more granular control over who manages which part of a Claude Enterprise workspace, reducing the need to grant broad privileges for routine administrative tasks. The change is part of a broader push toward enterprise-grade governance controls as Claude adoption scales within large organizations.
updates.accuracy_notes: Confirmed via Releasebot aggregator and web search snippets drawing directly from the Anthropic release notes page. Details are internally consistent. Exact release date is June 8 based on the 'last updated June 9' note on the release notes page with this being among the latest entries.
